detail_text: Glucosamine Extreme 1550mg - Joint Pain Relief Supplement, Improves Joint Flexibility & Lubrication Nano Singapore Glucosamine Extreme is a high-strength joint support supplement formulated to help support cartilage health, flexibility, and everyday joint comfort—so you can move with more confidence. It delivers 1,550 mg of high-purity Glucosamine HCL combined with Vitamin D3 to support both joint cushioning and bone strength for a stronger foundation in daily life. Key Benefits - Supports bone strength - Promotes cartilage health - Enhances flexibility & mobility - Supports targeted joint comfort - Supports smoother, more stable movement for an active lifestyle What Makes It Different - High-potency 1,550 mg dose of Glucosamine HCL (brand-stated) to provide concentrated structural support for joints - Cartilage & mobility support: designed to help maintain your body’s natural “shock absorbers” for smoother motion - Bone & joint synergy: includes Vitamin D3 to support calcium absorption and overall frame stability - Vegetarian-friendly Powerhouse Ingredients - Glucosamine Hydrochloride (HCL) – supports cartilage “cushioning” and supports synovial fluid production for smoother joint movement* - Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol) – supports calcium optimization, bone strength, and muscle support around the joints for better stability
detail_html:
Glucosamine Extreme 1550mg - Joint Pain Relief Supplement, Improves Joint Flexibility & Lubrication

Nano Singapore Glucosamine Extreme is a high-strength joint support supplement formulated to help support cartilage health, flexibility, and everyday joint comfort—so you can move with more confidence. It delivers 1,550 mg of high-purity Glucosamine HCL combined with Vitamin D3 to support both joint cushioning and bone strength for a stronger foundation in daily life.

Key Benefits

- Supports bone strength

- Promotes cartilage health

- Enhances flexibility & mobility

- Supports targeted joint comfort

- Supports smoother, more stable movement for an active lifestyle

What Makes It Different

- High-potency 1,550 mg dose of Glucosamine HCL (brand-stated) to provide concentrated structural support for joints

- Cartilage & mobility support: designed to help maintain your body’s natural “shock absorbers” for smoother motion

- Bone & joint synergy: includes Vitamin D3 to support calcium absorption and overall frame stability

- Vegetarian-friendly

Powerhouse Ingredients

- Glucosamine Hydrochloride (HCL) – supports cartilage “cushioning” and supports synovial fluid production for smoother joint movement*

- Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol) – supports calcium optimization, bone strength, and muscle support around the joints for better stability

detail_text: Mulittea Glucosamine Chondroitin for Joint & Bone Support with Additional Collagen Peptides for Hair, Skin and Nails Brand:MULITTEA Item Type: Glucosamine and Chondroitin Quantity: 60/120 Capsules Shelf Life: 2 years Joint Supplement for Men & Women: Whether you’re looking for a knee joint support supplement or something that can help you stay active and live a healthy lifestyle, our women and men’s joint health supplement can help! Chondroitin Sulfate Capsules: Our Glucosamine and Chondroitin sulfate capsules promote joint wellness, comfort, flexibility, and mobility. Unique & Effective Formula: Chondroitin & Glucosamine nutritional supplements, particularly those with Collagen joint support supplements work for things as small as elbow joint support, to something as big as improved function for all your joints. Super Joint Support: Our Glucosamine Chondroitin complex is a complete complex with additional Collagen Peptides for boost to not only your joints, but your hair, skin, and nails as well! Bone and Joint Vitamins: Bone and joint health supplements for women and men are key to your comfort. Glucosamine with Chondroitin is a dietary supplement that helps keep your joints moving smoothly by helping support joint cushioning. These gluten free Glucosamine Chondroitin capsules have no synthetic dyes and no artificial flavors Product Note: Exposure to heat or sunlight may lead to melting/damage of product,keep in a cool, dry place and please sealing..Adults take two of these Glucosamine capsules daily with water and a meal.

title: RECOGEN GOLD 30's Bone & Joint Support Formula｜Advanced Nutritional Care for Stronger Bones & Better Mobility
detail_text: RECOGEN GOLD 30'S Benefits -Cartilage regeneration -Nourish cartilage -Relief pain -Reduce inflammation -Decrease damaging enzymes -Improve bone health Each sachet (10g) of Recogen Gold contains: 1.Bioactive Collagen Peptides Recogen Bioactive Collagen Peptides, commonly known as hydrolyzed gelatin effectively stimulates the production of collagen.Made from 100% pure collagen obtained through enzymatic hydrolysis from clean and safe bovine sources.Easily absorbed due to lower molecular weight and shorter peptide chains, increasing recovery potential.Enhanced to work 15x faster than normal collagen. 2.Rose Hip Extract Rose Hip Extract is a natural extract from the fruit of the rose plant.Rose Hip is high in Vitamin C and antioxidants, making it a great nutritional supplement.High in antioxidants, Effective in reducing joint inflammation.Combats effects of cartilage damaging enzymes.Safe and natural with no side effects. Direction to use: Mix each sachet with sufficient amount of cold boiled water, once daily.Best taken with empty stomach. RECOGEN CALCIUM PLUS 30'S Benefits -Strong Healthy Bones -Cartilage Regeneration -Nourish Cartilage -Relieve Pain Each sachet (10g) of Recogen Plus contains: 1.Calcium lactate pentahydrate 1g -Calcium is the building block for strong bones.Together with bioactive collagen peptides they improve bone health to maintain healthy bones and keep you active.(Calcium lactate is used in Recogen Calcium Plus Powder for easy digestion and absorption) 2.Collagen hydrolysate 9g -The amino acid composition in Recogen is similar to that found in human cartilage, ensuring maximum and efficient absorption of nutrients by your body.Nourished cartilage cushions joints better and reduces crackling sounds when moving around. -Bioactive Collagen Peptides increases the growth of cartilage, cushioning affected joints and providing relief from pain.Pain relief helps you regain mobility so that you will be as active as before in your daily activities! Direction to use: -Best to consume before breakfast. -Dissolve one sachet to approximay 200ml of cool or warm beverage (milk, juice, water).Stir until powder compley dissolves.Consume once daily. Do avoid adding Recogen to boiling hot water as it will destroy the nutritional properties of Recogen.Where possible, consume Recogen in the morning as Recogen can provide you with energy content to start the day. * Recogen is a joint collagen supplement that contains only protein and minerals.Recogen is also fat free and sugar free. # They collect # gold # relief # pain # osteoporosis # recogencalciumplus
detail_html:
RECOGEN GOLD 30'S

Benefits

-Cartilage regeneration

-Nourish cartilage

-Relief pain

-Reduce inflammation

-Decrease damaging enzymes

-Improve bone health



Each sachet (10g) of Recogen Gold contains:

1.Bioactive Collagen Peptides

Recogen Bioactive Collagen Peptides, commonly known as hydrolyzed gelatin effectively stimulates the production of collagen.Made from 100% pure collagen obtained through enzymatic hydrolysis from clean and safe bovine sources.Easily absorbed due to lower molecular weight and shorter peptide chains, increasing recovery potential.Enhanced to work 15x faster than normal collagen.



2.Rose Hip Extract

Rose Hip Extract is a natural extract from the fruit of the rose plant.Rose Hip is high in Vitamin C and antioxidants, making it a great nutritional supplement.High in antioxidants, Effective in reducing joint inflammation.Combats effects of cartilage damaging enzymes.Safe and natural with no side effects.



Direction to use:

Mix each sachet with sufficient amount of cold boiled water, once daily.Best taken with empty stomach.



RECOGEN CALCIUM PLUS 30'S

Benefits

-Strong Healthy Bones

-Cartilage Regeneration

-Nourish Cartilage

-Relieve Pain



Each sachet (10g) of Recogen Plus contains:

1.Calcium lactate pentahydrate 1g

-Calcium is the building block for strong bones.Together with bioactive collagen peptides they improve bone health to maintain healthy bones and keep you active.(Calcium lactate is used in Recogen Calcium Plus Powder for easy digestion and absorption)

2.Collagen hydrolysate 9g

-The amino acid composition in Recogen is similar to that found in human cartilage, ensuring maximum and efficient absorption of nutrients by your body.Nourished cartilage cushions joints better and reduces crackling sounds when moving around.

-Bioactive Collagen Peptides increases the growth of cartilage, cushioning affected joints and providing relief from pain.Pain relief helps you regain mobility so that you will be as active as before in your daily activities!

Direction to use:

-Best to consume before breakfast.

-Dissolve one sachet to approximay 200ml of cool or warm beverage (milk, juice, water).Stir until powder compley dissolves.Consume once daily.



Do avoid adding Recogen to boiling hot water as it will destroy the nutritional properties of Recogen.Where possible, consume Recogen in the morning as Recogen can provide you with energy content to start the day.

* Recogen is a joint collagen supplement that contains only protein and minerals.Recogen is also fat free and sugar free.

# They collect # gold # relief # pain # osteoporosis # recogencalciumplus

product.desc:
Hi! We’re NEENCA - a wellness brand focused on providing medical-grade quality, affordable orthopedic braces and supports.

We believe everyone should be able to move freely and comfortably without acute and chronic pain holding them back. You can trust that with NEENCA you’ll enjoy more comfortable movement so you can get back to life.
product.highlights:
• Universal and adjustable SI Joint Belt fits a range of teen to adult men and women with a hip circumference of 28” to 45”; measure before buying to ensure this band will provide a comfortable fit for you
  • Ultimate lower back and hip pain relief for sore, injured or aching joints; powerful compression supports the sacroiliac joints while you’re active throughout the day, while promoting proper healing and preventing from further injury or pain
  • Alleviate aching SI joint pain naturally while stating active; hip band helps treat and manage pain or inflammation caused by sciatica, postpartum or pregnancy lower back strains, hip bursitis, osteoarthritis and pinched nerve pain
  • Quick and simple to put on and take off, simply wrap the discreet belt around your hips and adjust to find the perfect level of pressure and support; the lightweight, thin and durable band can be worn comfortably outside of clothing or against skin all day and night as needed
  • Durable, medical-grade materials will hold up overtime; prevent slipping and sliding throughout the day with the adjustable, double-pull tension straps, avoid re-adjusting the belt as you go about your daily work, exercise, walking or other physical activities

aiTexts: The NEENCA Adjustable Hinged Knee Joint Support Brace provides targeted stabilization for various leg fractures and ligament injuries.
Designed to fit tibia plateau fractures, tibiofibular fractures, and support knee cruciate ligament and meniscus injuries.
Ideal for pre- and post-operation use, it helps prevent knee contracture and supports rehabilitation.
The adjustable hinge limits joint movement to ensure effective healing and correction.
Made for durability and comfort, it is suitable for daily wear during recovery.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
NEENCA Adjustable Hinged Orthopedic Knee Joint Support Knee Leg Brace Protector Post Surgery Bone Orthosis Ligament Care Joint Support

PLEASE READ BEFORE PURCHASING: There are plenty of types for you to choose, different type suitable for different height and weight of people and different angle adjustment dial. Please feel free to contact us if you have any query and don't know choose which type.

Features:

- The brace is made by strong aluminium bar in both inside and outside to increase the brace effect maximun limit. The thigh circumference can adjustable the size via the limit hole.

- The lining of the product is made by high density spongia for medical ,air permeability is so good which is different from other materical non venting quality. Our product 's design is wearing comfortable ,and the wound place is hardly infection.

Size:

Style 2 Universal:

Adjustment range:0-120 degree, 0-120 degree fixed, precision is 10 degree.

Applicable height:155~180cm

Applicable weight:50~80kg

Note: The support is of adjustable design, and the length and angle of fat and thin can be adjusted.

Adjustment range:-10-120 degrees activity, -10-120 degrees fixed ,precision is 10 degrees

Applicable height:110~150cm

Applicable weight:25~50kg

Product Details

Description

MOVE FREE Ultra Triple Action (Joint, Cartilage And Bone) 75s
This Unique Joint Support Supplement Contains Type Ii Collagen, Boron And Hyaluronic Acid To Help Preserve & Maintain Healthy Cartilage, As Well As Help Support Healthy Bones.*Move Free Ultra Triple Action Is Clinically Proven To Deliver Better Joint Comfort That Improves Over Time.
*Our Proprietary Joint Health Blend Contains Type Ii Collagen, The Same Protein Found In Healthy Cartilage. Type Ii Collagen Pills Work With Your Immune System To Help Preserve & Maintain Cartilage.*Boron Supports Bone Health By Maintaining Healthy Levels Of Vitamin D, Calcium And Magnesium.

Product Usage

1 Pills Per Day

Ingredients

Proprietary Cartilage Blend 40Mg (Cartilage And Potassium Chloride As Undernatured Type Ll Collagen), Boron(As Boron Glycinate) 5Mg, Hyaluronic Acid 3.3Mg

title: BLACKMORES 维骨素 1500 - Promotes Joint Recovery & Cartilage Support | Daily Maintenance for Healthy Bones & Joints
detail_text: 【Blackmores】Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day | 葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500 每日一片 每日一剂 · 缓解关节炎症状 | One-Daily Dose · Relieves Arthritis Symptoms 促进软骨结构 · 减轻轻度关节疼痛 | Promotes Cartilage Structure · Relieves Mild Joint Aches & Pains 非转基因 · 可持续来源 | Non-GMO · Sustainably Sourced 180片/瓶 · 6个月用量 | 180 Tablets per Bottle · 6-Month Supply 🌟 产品介绍 | Product Overview Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day 是一款每日一剂的葡萄糖胺硫酸盐补充剂，有助于 缓解关节炎症状 ，包括关节的 轻度酸痛和疼痛 。 Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day is a one-daily dose of glucosamine sulfate that helps relieve symptoms of arthritis , including mild aches and pains in the joints . 🔬 什么是葡萄糖胺？| What is Glucosamine? 葡萄糖胺是人体内天然存在的物质，有助于 促进软骨结构 。它是一种单糖分子化合物，通常由人体产生并存在于每个人体内。葡萄糖胺作为前体，用于制造蛋白聚糖、糖蛋白和糖胺聚糖、透明质酸等大分子。这些物质是人体几乎所有组织的组成部分，主要存在于 软骨 中，位于骨骼末端，尤其是关节处。 Glucosamine is a substance found within the body that helps promote the structure of cartilage . It is a monosaccharide that is normally created and is found in everyone's body. Glucosamine is used as a precursor to create macromolecules such as proteoglycans, glycoproteins, glycosaminoglycans, and hyaluronic acid. These substances are components of almost every tissue in the body, found mostly in cartilage , which is located at the ends of bones, especially at joints. 软骨由胶原纤维基质和其中的蛋白聚糖组成。蛋白聚糖是一种大分子，能够吸收水分，使软骨具有 弹性 ，并能支持骨骼和关节的活动。这是葡萄糖胺在关节功能中的重要作用。此外，葡萄糖胺还具有抑制多种炎症物质活性的作用，因此具有 减轻关节炎症、缓解关节炎引起的疼痛、肿胀和僵硬 的效果，并有助于 减缓关节退化 。 Cartilage is composed of a matrix of collagen fibers with proteoglycans within it. Proteoglycan is a large molecule that has the ability to pull water towards itself, making the cartilage flexible and able to support bone and joint movement. This is considered an important role of glucosamine in joint function. In addition, glucosamine has the effect of inhibiting the activity of many inflammatory substances, therefore it has the effect of reducing joint inflammation, relieving pain, swelling, and stiffness from arthritis , and helps slow down joint degeneration . ✨ 重要特点 | Important Features ✅ 缓解轻度类风湿关节炎症状 Relieves symptoms of mild rheumatoid arthritis ✅ 缓解轻微关节酸痛和疼痛 Relieves minor joint aches and pains ✅ 支持关节活动和健康 Supports joint movement and health ✅ 促进健康关节软骨的生长 Promotes the growth of healthy joint cartilage ✅ 支持整体健康和福祉 Support general health and wellbeing ✅ 非转基因葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 ，可持续来源 Non-GMO glucosamine sulfate that is sustainably sourced 🌿 核心成分 | Key Ingredients 葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500mg/片 Glucosamine Sulfate 1500mg per tablet 非转基因 | Non-GMO 可持续来源 | Sustainably sourced 👥 适用人群 | Suitable For ✅ 关节炎患者 | Those with arthritis ✅ 关节酸痛、疼痛者 | Those with joint aches and pains ✅ 希望支持关节健康者 | Those looking to support joint health ✅ 关注关节软骨健康者 | Those focused on cartilage health 💊 用法用量 | How to Eat 📅 每日1片 ，餐间服用（任何一餐均可） Take 1 tablet per day between meals, any meal 📦 180片/瓶 ，可用6个月 180 capsules per bottle , good for 6 months ⚠️ 建议与注意事项 | Advice & Precautions 🚫 对海鲜（尤其是虾蟹）过敏史者，不建议食用 People with a history of allergies to seafood, especially shrimp and crab, are not recommended to eat it 📦 产品规格 | Specifications 品名 ：Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day Blackmores 葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500 每日一片 规格 ：180片/瓶 | 180 Tablets per Bottle 用量 ：6个月用量 | 6-Month Supply 核心成分 ：葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500mg/片 Glucosamine Sulfate 1500mg per tablet 特点 ：每日一剂、非转基因、可持续来源 One-daily dose, Non-GMO, sustainably sourced 适用人群 ：有关节炎、关节疼痛症状者 Those with arthritis, joint pain symptoms ✅ 产品亮点 | Product Highlights ✨ 每日一剂 – 方便易用，易于坚持 ✨ 高含量 – 每片1500mg葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 ✨ 非转基因 – 品质保证 ✨ 可持续来源 – 环保选择 ✨ 6个月用量 – 180片/瓶，长期养护 ✨ 缓解关节炎症状 – 疼痛、肿胀、僵硬 🌟 每天 Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500，每日一剂，缓解关节炎症状，促进软骨健康，让您行动自如！ Daily Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 – one-daily dose, relieves arthritis symptoms, promotes cartilage health, keeps you moving freely! 👉 每天 Blackmores 葡萄糖胺，1500mg高含量，非转基因来源，缓解关节疼痛，支持软骨健康！ 👉 Blackmores Glucosamine daily – 1500mg high content, Non-GMO source, relieves joint pain, supports cartilage health!
detail_html:
【Blackmores】Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day | 葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500 每日一片

每日一剂 · 缓解关节炎症状 | One-Daily Dose · Relieves Arthritis Symptoms

促进软骨结构 · 减轻轻度关节疼痛 | Promotes Cartilage Structure · Relieves Mild Joint Aches & Pains

非转基因 · 可持续来源 | Non-GMO · Sustainably Sourced

180片/瓶 · 6个月用量 | 180 Tablets per Bottle · 6-Month Supply

🌟 产品介绍 | Product Overview

Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day 是一款每日一剂的葡萄糖胺硫酸盐补充剂，有助于缓解关节炎症状，包括关节的轻度酸痛和疼痛。

Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day is a one-daily dose of glucosamine sulfate that helps relieve symptoms of arthritis, including mild aches and pains in the joints.

🔬 什么是葡萄糖胺？| What is Glucosamine?

葡萄糖胺是人体内天然存在的物质，有助于促进软骨结构。它是一种单糖分子化合物，通常由人体产生并存在于每个人体内。葡萄糖胺作为前体，用于制造蛋白聚糖、糖蛋白和糖胺聚糖、透明质酸等大分子。这些物质是人体几乎所有组织的组成部分，主要存在于软骨中，位于骨骼末端，尤其是关节处。

Glucosamine is a substance found within the body that helps promote the structure of cartilage. It is a monosaccharide that is normally created and is found in everyone's body. Glucosamine is used as a precursor to create macromolecules such as proteoglycans, glycoproteins, glycosaminoglycans, and hyaluronic acid. These substances are components of almost every tissue in the body, found mostly in cartilage, which is located at the ends of bones, especially at joints.

软骨由胶原纤维基质和其中的蛋白聚糖组成。蛋白聚糖是一种大分子，能够吸收水分，使软骨具有弹性，并能支持骨骼和关节的活动。这是葡萄糖胺在关节功能中的重要作用。此外，葡萄糖胺还具有抑制多种炎症物质活性的作用，因此具有减轻关节炎症、缓解关节炎引起的疼痛、肿胀和僵硬的效果，并有助于减缓关节退化。

Cartilage is composed of a matrix of collagen fibers with proteoglycans within it. Proteoglycan is a large molecule that has the ability to pull water towards itself, making the cartilage flexible and able to support bone and joint movement. This is considered an important role of glucosamine in joint function. In addition, glucosamine has the effect of inhibiting the activity of many inflammatory substances, therefore it has the effect of reducing joint inflammation, relieving pain, swelling, and stiffness from arthritis, and helps slow down joint degeneration.

✨ 重要特点 | Important Features

✅ 缓解轻度类风湿关节炎症状

Relieves symptoms of mild rheumatoid arthritis

✅ 缓解轻微关节酸痛和疼痛

Relieves minor joint aches and pains

✅ 支持关节活动和健康

Supports joint movement and health

✅ 促进健康关节软骨的生长

Promotes the growth of healthy joint cartilage

✅ 支持整体健康和福祉

Support general health and wellbeing

✅ 非转基因葡萄糖胺硫酸盐，可持续来源

Non-GMO glucosamine sulfate that is sustainably sourced

🌿 核心成分 | Key Ingredients

  • 葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500mg/片

    Glucosamine Sulfate 1500mg per tablet
  • 非转基因 | Non-GMO
  • 可持续来源 | Sustainably sourced

👥 适用人群 | Suitable For

✅ 关节炎患者 | Those with arthritis

✅ 关节酸痛、疼痛者 | Those with joint aches and pains

✅ 希望支持关节健康者 | Those looking to support joint health

✅ 关注关节软骨健康者 | Those focused on cartilage health

💊 用法用量 | How to Eat

📅 每日1片，餐间服用（任何一餐均可）

Take 1 tablet per day between meals, any meal

📦 180片/瓶，可用6个月

180 capsules per bottle, good for 6 months

⚠️ 建议与注意事项 | Advice & Precautions

🚫 对海鲜（尤其是虾蟹）过敏史者，不建议食用

People with a history of allergies to seafood, especially shrimp and crab, are not recommended to eat it

📦 产品规格 | Specifications

  • 品名：Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day

    Blackmores 葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500 每日一片
  • 规格：180片/瓶 | 180 Tablets per Bottle

It is a monosaccharide that is normally created and is found in everyone's body. Glucosamine is used as a precursor to create macromolecules such as proteoglycans, glycoproteins, glycosaminoglycans, and hyaluronic acid. These substances are components of almost every tissue in the body, found mostly in cartilage , which is located at the ends of bones, especially at joints. 软骨由胶原纤维基质和其中的蛋白聚糖组成。蛋白聚糖是一种大分子，能够吸收水分，使软骨具有 弹性 ，并能支持骨骼和关节的活动。这是葡萄糖胺在关节功能中的重要作用。此外，葡萄糖胺还具有抑制多种炎症物质活性的作用，因此具有 减轻关节炎症、缓解关节炎引起的疼痛、肿胀和僵硬 的效果，并有助于 减缓关节退化 。 Cartilage is composed of a matrix of collagen fibers with proteoglycans within it. product.desc:
【Blackmores】Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day | 葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500 每日一片

每日一剂 · 缓解关节炎症状 | One-Daily Dose · Relieves Arthritis Symptoms

促进软骨结构 · 减轻轻度关节疼痛 | Promotes Cartilage Structure · Relieves Mild Joint Aches & Pains

非转基因 · 可持续来源 | Non-GMO · Sustainably Sourced

180片/瓶 · 6个月用量 | 180 Tablets per Bottle · 6-Month Supply

🌟 产品介绍 | Product Overview

Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day 是一款每日一剂的葡萄糖胺硫酸盐补充剂，有助于缓解关节炎症状，包括关节的轻度酸痛和疼痛。

Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day is a one-daily dose of glucosamine sulfate that helps relieve symptoms of arthritis, including mild aches and pains in the joints.

🔬 什么是葡萄糖胺？| What is Glucosamine?

葡萄糖胺是人体内天然存在的物质，有助于促进软骨结构。它是一种单糖分子化合物，通常由人体产生并存在于每个人体内。葡萄糖胺作为前体，用于制造蛋白聚糖、糖蛋白和糖胺聚糖、透明质酸等大分子。这些物质是人体几乎所有组织的组成部分，主要存在于软骨中，位于骨骼末端，尤其是关节处。

Glucosamine is a substance found within the body that helps promote the structure of cartilage. It is a monosaccharide that is normally created and is found in everyone's body. Glucosamine is used as a precursor to create macromolecules such as proteoglycans, glycoproteins, glycosaminoglycans, and hyaluronic acid. These substances are components of almost every tissue in the body, found mostly in cartilage, which is located at the ends of bones, especially at joints.

软骨由胶原纤维基质和其中的蛋白聚糖组成。蛋白聚糖是一种大分子，能够吸收水分，使软骨具有弹性，并能支持骨骼和关节的活动。这是葡萄糖胺在关节功能中的重要作用。此外，葡萄糖胺还具有抑制多种炎症物质活性的作用，因此具有减轻关节炎症、缓解关节炎引起的疼痛、肿胀和僵硬的效果，并有助于减缓关节退化。

Cartilage is composed of a matrix of collagen fibers with proteoglycans within it. Proteoglycan is a large molecule that has the ability to pull water towards itself, making the cartilage flexible and able to support bone and joint movement. This is considered an important role of glucosamine in joint function. In addition, glucosamine has the effect of inhibiting the activity of many inflammatory substances, therefore it has the effect of reducing joint inflammation, relieving pain, swelling, and stiffness from arthritis, and helps slow down joint degeneration.

✨ 重要特点 | Important Features

✅ 缓解轻度类风湿关节炎症状

Relieves symptoms of mild rheumatoid arthritis

✅ 缓解轻微关节酸痛和疼痛

Relieves minor joint aches and pains

✅ 支持关节活动和健康

Supports joint movement and health

✅ 促进健康关节软骨的生长

Promotes the growth of healthy joint cartilage

✅ 支持整体健康和福祉

Support general health and wellbeing

✅ 非转基因葡萄糖胺硫酸盐，可持续来源

Non-GMO glucosamine sulfate that is sustainably sourced

🌿 核心成分 | Key Ingredients

  • 葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500mg/片

    Glucosamine Sulfate 1500mg per tablet
  • 非转基因 | Non-GMO
  • 可持续来源 | Sustainably sourced

👥 适用人群 | Suitable For

✅ 关节炎患者 | Those with arthritis

✅ 关节酸痛、疼痛者 | Those with joint aches and pains

✅ 希望支持关节健康者 | Those looking to support joint health

✅ 关注关节软骨健康者 | Those focused on cartilage health

💊 用法用量 | How to Eat

📅 每日1片，餐间服用（任何一餐均可）

Take 1 tablet per day between meals, any meal

📦 180片/瓶，可用6个月

180 capsules per bottle, good for 6 months

⚠️ 建议与注意事项 | Advice & Precautions

🚫 对海鲜（尤其是虾蟹）过敏史者，不建议食用

People with a history of allergies to seafood, especially shrimp and crab, are not recommended to eat it

📦 产品规格 | Specifications

  • 品名：Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 One-A-Day

    Blackmores 葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500 每日一片
  • 规格：180片/瓶 | 180 Tablets per Bottle
  • 用量：6个月用量 | 6-Month Supply
  • 核心成分：葡萄糖胺硫酸盐 1500mg/片

    Glucosamine Sulfate 1500mg per tablet
  • 特点：每日一剂、非转基因、可持续来源

    One-daily dose, Non-GMO, sustainably sourced
  • 适用人群：有关节炎、关节疼痛症状者

    Those with arthritis, joint pain symptoms

✅ 产品亮点 | Product Highlights

✨ 每日一剂 – 方便易用，易于坚持

✨ 高含量 – 每片1500mg葡萄糖胺硫酸盐

✨ 非转基因 – 品质保证

✨ 可持续来源 – 环保选择

✨ 6个月用量 – 180片/瓶，长期养护

✨ 缓解关节炎症状 – 疼痛、肿胀、僵硬

🌟 每天 Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500，每日一剂，缓解关节炎症状，促进软骨健康，让您行动自如！

Daily Blackmores Glucosamine Sulfate 1500 – one-daily dose, relieves arthritis symptoms, promotes cartilage health, keeps you moving freely!

detail_text: Himalaya Wellness Pure Herbs Shigru Bone & Joint Wellness Tablet helps suppress joint inflammation and pain by targeting key enzymes that facilitate the release of pro-inflammatory chemicals in the joints. The antioxidant phytoconstituents present in shigru alleviate gouty inflammation of the joint by inhibiting the key enzyme that is involved in excessive uric acid production. Due to its high nutritional content, shigru nourishes body tissues, especially bones and joints. title: Biofinest Vegan Vegetarian Glucosamine Joint Support - Enhanced Absorption with MSM Calcium Zinc Tumeric Root Black Pepper Extract - Healthy Bone Cartilage Joint Structure Tissue Mobility Flexibility Joint Pain Comfort (90 Coated Tablets)
detail_text: Biofinest Vegan Vegetarian Glucosamine Joint Support - Enhanced Absorption with MSM Calcium Zinc Tumeric Root Black Pepper Extract - Healthy Bone Cartilage Joint Structure Tissue Mobility Flexibility Joint Pain Comfort (90 Coated Tablets) Biofinest Vegan Glucosamine Joint Support stands out as a comprehensive solution crafted with a blend of seven key ingredients carefully selected to promote joint health and mobility. Each ingredient plays a crucial role in supporting the integrity of joints and overall joint function. Biofinest Vegan Glucosamine Joint Support is formulated with plant-derived ingredients, making it suitable for individuals following a vegan lifestyle. It offers a natural alternative to traditional joint support supplements, harnessing the power of plant-based ingredients to promote overall well-being and mobility. Incorporating Biofinest Vegan Glucosamine Joint Support into your daily wellness routine can be a proactive step toward supporting joint health and maintaining an active lifestyle. By nourishing your joints with these essential nutrients, you can enjoy greater comfort, flexibility, and mobility, allowing you to continue doing the activities you love. ✅ Glucosamine Sulfate (from Corn Glucosamine Sulfate 2KCl) forms the cornerstone of this formulation, providing 1500mg per serving. Glucosamine is a naturally occurring compound in the body, primarily found in cartilage, which cushions and protects joints. It supports the maintenance of healthy joint structure and function, helping to prevent the breakdown of cartilage and supporting its repair. ✅ MSM (Methylsulfonylmethane) is another key component renowned for its anti-inflammatory properties. By promoting a healthy inflammatory response, MSM supports joint comfort and enhances flexibility, making it easier to maintain an active lifestyle. ✅ Calcium Carbonate contributes to bone health, which is essential for overall joint integrity. Strong bones provide a stable foundation for joints, reducing the risk of fractures and supporting long-term joint health. Adequate calcium intake is crucial for maintaining bone density and strength, which directly impacts joint stability and function. ✅ Zinc Citrate plays a vital role in collagen synthesis, a protein essential for maintaining the structural integrity of joints and connective tissues. Collagen provides the framework for cartilage and helps to cushion joints, promoting resilience and reducing the impact of daily wear and tear. By supporting collagen production, zinc contributes to joint health and helps to protect against degradation. ✅ Turmeric Root Extract (95% Curcumin) offers potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits. Curcumin, the active compound in turmeric, helps to manage joint discomfort and swelling. Its antioxidant properties also protect joint tissues from oxidative stress, supporting overall joint health and longevity. ✅ Black Pepper Extract is included to enhance the bioavailability of the other ingredients. Piperine, the active compound in black pepper, helps to improve nutrient absorption, ensuring that the body can effectively utilize the beneficial compounds present in the supplement. Enhanced bioavailability maximizes the efficacy of the formula, allowing for optimal joint support. ✅ Vitamin D3 is an essential nutrient that supports calcium absorption and bone health. It plays a crucial role in maintaining bone density and strength, which are essential for joint stability and overall mobility. Adequate vitamin D levels contribute to joint health by ensuring proper calcium utilization and supporting the structural integrity of bones and cartilage. Together, these ingredients work synergistically to provide comprehensive support for joint health and mobility. By addressing multiple aspects of joint function, Biofinest Vegan Glucosamine Joint Support helps to promote flexibility, support healthy inflammatory response, and support the structural integrity of joints and connective tissues. This holistic approach is beneficial for individuals looking to maintain or improve joint health, whether they are athletes, active adults, or those experiencing occasional joint discomfort. Suggested Use/ How to Use: As a dietary supplement, take 2 tablets once a day, or as directed by a health professional. Store in a cool dry place. Do not expose under sunlight or moisture. Close the cap after opening. Why Choose Biofinest Supplement: -Made in USA premium quality, sustainably sourced from trusted origin, formulated with high strength pure natural ingredients for optimal absorption. We use custom formulation to integrate all the best ingredients for your maximum health benefits. -Big bottle for huge value for money, best savings per capsule. Direct USA manufacturer. That’s how we keep the price low for premium products. Quality products at a fraction of the going price. -Pure, gluten-Free, non-GMO, vegan, 3rd party lab tested, GMP/FDA registered facility. detail_html:
Biofinest Vegan Vegetarian Glucosamine Joint Support - Enhanced Absorption with MSM Calcium Zinc Tumeric Root Black Pepper Extract - Healthy Bone Cartilage Joint Structure Tissue Mobility Flexibility Joint Pain Comfort (90 Coated Tablets)

Biofinest Vegan Glucosamine Joint Support stands out as a comprehensive solution crafted with a blend of seven key ingredients carefully selected to promote joint health and mobility. Each ingredient plays a crucial role in supporting the integrity of joints and overall joint function.

Biofinest Vegan Glucosamine Joint Support is formulated with plant-derived ingredients, making it suitable for individuals following a vegan lifestyle. It offers a natural alternative to traditional joint support supplements, harnessing the power of plant-based ingredients to promote overall well-being and mobility.

Incorporating Biofinest Vegan Glucosamine Joint Support into your daily wellness routine can be a proactive step toward supporting joint health and maintaining an active lifestyle. By nourishing your joints with these essential nutrients, you can enjoy greater comfort, flexibility, and mobility, allowing you to continue doing the activities you love.

✅Glucosamine Sulfate (from Corn Glucosamine Sulfate 2KCl) forms the cornerstone of this formulation, providing 1500mg per serving. Glucosamine is a naturally occurring compound in the body, primarily found in cartilage, which cushions and protects joints. It supports the maintenance of healthy joint structure and function, helping to prevent the breakdown of cartilage and supporting its repair.

✅MSM (Methylsulfonylmethane) is another key component renowned for its anti-inflammatory properties. By promoting a healthy inflammatory response, MSM supports joint comfort and enhances flexibility, making it easier to maintain an active lifestyle.

✅Calcium Carbonate contributes to bone health, which is essential for overall joint integrity. Strong bones provide a stable foundation for joints, reducing the risk of fractures and supporting long-term joint health. Adequate calcium intake is crucial for maintaining bone density and strength, which directly impacts joint stability and function.

✅Zinc Citrate plays a vital role in collagen synthesis, a protein essential for maintaining the structural integrity of joints and connective tissues. Collagen provides the framework for cartilage and helps to cushion joints, promoting resilience and reducing the impact of daily wear and tear. By supporting collagen production, zinc contributes to joint health and helps to protect against degradation.

✅Turmeric Root Extract (95% Curcumin) offers potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits. Curcumin, the active compound in turmeric, helps to manage joint discomfort and swelling. Its antioxidant properties also protect joint tissues from oxidative stress, supporting overall joint health and longevity.

✅Black Pepper Extract is included to enhance the bioavailability of the other ingredients. Piperine, the active compound in black pepper, helps to improve nutrient absorption, ensuring that the body can effectively utilize the beneficial compounds present in the supplement. Enhanced bioavailability maximizes the efficacy of the formula, allowing for optimal joint support.

✅Vitamin D3 is an essential nutrient that supports calcium absorption and bone health. It plays a crucial role in maintaining bone density and strength, which are essential for joint stability and overall mobility. Adequate vitamin D levels contribute to joint health by ensuring proper calcium utilization and supporting the structural integrity of bones and cartilage.

Together, these ingredients work synergistically to provide comprehensive support for joint health and mobility. By addressing multiple aspects of joint function, Biofinest Vegan Glucosamine Joint Support helps to promote flexibility, support healthy inflammatory response, and support the structural integrity of joints and connective tissues. This holistic approach is beneficial for individuals looking to maintain or improve joint health, whether they are athletes, active adults, or those experiencing occasional joint discomfort.

Suggested Use/ How to Use:

As a dietary supplement, take 2 tablets once a day, or as directed by a health professional. Store in a cool dry place. Do not expose under sunlight or moisture. Close the cap after opening.

Why Choose Biofinest Supplement:

-Made in USA premium quality, sustainably sourced from trusted origin, formulated with high strength pure natural ingredients for optimal absorption. We use custom formulation to integrate all the best ingredients for your maximum health benefits. 

-Big bottle for huge value for money, best savings per capsule. Direct USA manufacturer. That’s how we keep the price low for premium products. Quality products at a fraction of the going price.  

-Pure, gluten-Free, non-GMO, vegan, 3rd party lab tested, GMP/FDA registered facility. Free of pesticides, herbicides, chemical fertilizers, fillers, yeast, sugar, soy, dairy, antibiotics and preservatives. We are proud to offer only 100% safe supplements for you and your family. 

-Double layer airtight sealed to ensure product authenticity, maximum protection and prolonged freshness. Industry grade dark amber bottle packaging to protect the supplement against any exposure to UV light and moisture. 

-Easy to use flip-open-close bottle cap for daily use; long expiry date (at least >1 year, unless clearance/ otherwise stated), convenience to carry around for home, office, workout and traveling.

-Smooth and easy to swallow form, no oversize capsules, no nauseating bitter after taste.

• Comfortable Fit : The sleeve is designed to fit comfortably around the knee joint, allowing for unrestricted movement during sports and daily activities.






• Easy Maintenance : Made from easy-to-clean materials, this protective sleeve requires minimal maintenance, making it convenient for regular use.






• Japanese Quality : This knee joint protective sleeve is directly supplied from Japan, ensuring high-quality craftsmanship and durability.






• Versatile Use : Designed for both men and women, this sleeve is perfect for sports enthusiasts and runners looking to protect their knees during physical activities.

aiTexts: This knee joint protector is designed to support recovery from meniscus and patella injuries while maintaining comfort.
Its ergonomic fit allows unrestricted movement, ideal for sports and daily activities.
Crafted from durable, easy-to-clean materials, it suits regular use with minimal upkeep.
Directly supplied from Japan, it reflects high-quality craftsmanship and reliability.
Suitable for both men and women, it is perfect for runners and sports enthusiasts seeking effective knee protection.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
• Effective Recovery : Specifically formulated for knee meniscus and patella injuries, this sleeve aids in recovery and provides necessary support.






• Comfortable Fit : The sleeve is designed to fit comfortably around the knee joint, allowing for unrestricted movement during sports and daily activities.






• Easy Maintenance : Made from easy-to-clean materials, this protective sleeve requires minimal maintenance, making it convenient for regular use.






• Japanese Quality : This knee joint protective sleeve is directly supplied from Japan, ensuring high-quality craftsmanship and durability.






• Versatile Use : Designed for both men and women, this sleeve is perfect for sports enthusiasts and runners looking to protect their knees during physical activities.
product.title: Japanese Manufacturer Direct Supply Men's Women's Knee Joint Protector Half Moon Bone Loss Recovery Sports Running Protection Co

title: HDI™ Bone & Joint Health | Must-Have for Healthy Aging & Mobility Support | 60 Capsules
detail_text: Expiry Date: 11/2026 HDI Bone & Joint Health - Better Mobility, Stronger Support Stay active with confidence. This plant-based formula supports bone density, eases joint discomfort, and promotes smooth, flexible movement — so you can keep doing what you love, every day. Better for You, Here’s Why • Helps maintain healthy bone and joint function • Eases joint discomfort and supports flexibility • Encourages normal cartilage repair and retention • Promotes smoother movement as you age • Vegetarian-friendly and gluten-free for daily support How-To Bee Better Take 2 capsules, twice daily after meals. Recommended for consistent, long-term use. Bee Better Storage Tips Keep tightly closed in a dry place below 30°C, away from sunlight. Refrigeration is recommended after opening. Good to Know: HALAL • Vegetarian Friendly • Gluten Free

title: Quan Wei Active Joint x3 Supplement Bone Health Joint Mobility Reduce Backache Joint Pain Relief
detail_text: Quan Wei Active Joint is a Singapore-patented joint health supplement (Patent No. 10201402819W) that combines Western actives like Glucosamine, Chondroitin, MSM, and Type II Collagen with TCM herbs such as Morinda, Epimedium, Sambucus, Drynaria, and Turmeric. This synergistic formula helps relieve joint pain and stiffness, promotes cartilage repair, improves joint flexibility, and supports long-term musculoskeletal health. Ideal for seniors, office workers, and active individuals seeking natural, comprehensive joint support. Key Ingredients: ✅Glucosamine Sulfate - Supports cartilage regeneration, slows joint degradation ✅Chondroitin Sulfate - Helps retain moisture & improve joint elasticity ✅MSM - Natural anti-inflammatory, reduces pain and stiffness ✅Type II Collagen - Rebuilds cartilage matrix, improves joint flexibility ✅Morinda Root - Relieves rheumatic pain, strengthens bones ✅Epimedium - Improves circulation, reduces fatigue ✅Sambucus & Drynaria - Supports bone strength & cartilage repair ✅Turmeric Root Extract - Potent natural anti-inflammatory & antioxidant Product Benefits: ✅Relieves pain from arthritis, nerve discomfort, muscle stiffness, and repetitive strain (e.g. mouse finger) ✅Reduces backache, inflammation, swelling, and improves overall blood circulation ✅ Repairs and regenerates cartilage cells to restore healthy joint function ✅Lubricates joints and improves cartilage elasticity for smoother movement ✅Enhances calcium absorption and supports bone strength ✅Regulates synovial fluid for better joint cushioning and flexibility ✅Supports liver vitality, benefiting those with weak lower back or knees ✅Boosts mobility and joint resilience for daily activities and aging support How To Use? ✅Take 2 capsules twice daily, after meals ✅For best results, continue for at least 22 days ✅Each bottle contains 100 capsules (80 + 20 free) Who Should Use This? ✅Seniors with joint stiffness or arthritis ✅Office workers with poor posture or sedentary lifestyle ✅Athletes or active individuals needing recovery support ✅People with backache, sore knees, or muscle tension ⚠️Consult a doctor if under medication or treatment. *Results may vary from person to person.
detail_html:
Quan Wei Active Joint is a Singapore-patented joint health supplement (Patent No. 10201402819W) that combines Western actives like Glucosamine, Chondroitin, MSM, and Type II Collagen with TCM herbs such as Morinda, Epimedium, Sambucus, Drynaria, and Turmeric.

This synergistic formula helps relieve joint pain and stiffness, promotes cartilage repair, improves joint flexibility, and supports long-term musculoskeletal health. Ideal for seniors, office workers, and active individuals seeking natural, comprehensive joint support.

Key Ingredients:

✅Glucosamine Sulfate - Supports cartilage regeneration, slows joint degradation

✅Chondroitin Sulfate - Helps retain moisture & improve joint elasticity

✅MSM - Natural anti-inflammatory, reduces pain and stiffness

✅Type II Collagen - Rebuilds cartilage matrix, improves joint flexibility

✅Morinda Root - Relieves rheumatic pain, strengthens bones

✅Epimedium - Improves circulation, reduces fatigue

✅Sambucus & Drynaria - Supports bone strength & cartilage repair

✅Turmeric Root Extract - Potent natural anti-inflammatory & antioxidant

Product Benefits:

✅Relieves pain from arthritis, nerve discomfort, muscle stiffness, and repetitive strain (e.g. mouse finger)

✅Reduces backache, inflammation, swelling, and improves overall blood circulation

✅ Repairs and regenerates cartilage cells to restore healthy joint function

✅Lubricates joints and improves cartilage elasticity for smoother movement

✅Enhances calcium absorption and supports bone strength

✅Regulates synovial fluid for better joint cushioning and flexibility

✅Supports liver vitality, benefiting those with weak lower back or knees

✅Boosts mobility and joint resilience for daily activities and aging support

How To Use?

✅Take 2 capsules twice daily, after meals

✅For best results, continue for at least 22 days

✅Each bottle contains 100 capsules (80 + 20 free)

Who Should Use This?

✅Seniors with joint stiffness or arthritis

✅Office workers with poor posture or sedentary lifestyle

✅Athletes or active individuals needing recovery support

✅People with backache, sore knees, or muscle tension

⚠️Consult a doctor if under medication or treatment.

*Results may vary from person to person.

This synergistic formula helps relieve joint pain and stiffness, promotes cartilage repair, improves joint flexibility, and supports long-term musculoskeletal health. Ideal for seniors, office workers, and active individuals seeking natural, comprehensive joint support. product.desc:
Quan Wei Active Joint is a Singapore-patented joint health supplement (Patent No. 10201402819W) that combines Western actives like Glucosamine, Chondroitin, MSM, and Type II Collagen with TCM herbs such as Morinda, Epimedium, Sambucus, Drynaria, and Turmeric.

This synergistic formula helps relieve joint pain and stiffness, promotes cartilage repair, improves joint flexibility, and supports long-term musculoskeletal health. Ideal for seniors, office workers, and active individuals seeking natural, comprehensive joint support.

Key Ingredients:

✅Glucosamine Sulfate - Supports cartilage regeneration, slows joint degradation

✅Chondroitin Sulfate - Helps retain moisture & improve joint elasticity

✅MSM - Natural anti-inflammatory, reduces pain and stiffness

✅Type II Collagen - Rebuilds cartilage matrix, improves joint flexibility

✅Morinda Root - Relieves rheumatic pain, strengthens bones

✅Epimedium - Improves circulation, reduces fatigue

✅Sambucus & Drynaria - Supports bone strength & cartilage repair

✅Turmeric Root Extract - Potent natural anti-inflammatory & antioxidant

Product Benefits:

✅Relieves pain from arthritis, nerve discomfort, muscle stiffness, and repetitive strain (e.g. mouse finger)

✅Reduces backache, inflammation, swelling, and improves overall blood circulation

✅ Repairs and regenerates cartilage cells to restore healthy joint function

✅Lubricates joints and improves cartilage elasticity for smoother movement

✅Enhances calcium absorption and supports bone strength

✅Regulates synovial fluid for better joint cushioning and flexibility

✅Supports liver vitality, benefiting those with weak lower back or knees

✅Boosts mobility and joint resilience for daily activities and aging support

How To Use?

✅Take 2 capsules twice daily, after meals

✅For best results, continue for at least 22 days

✅Each bottle contains 100 capsules (80 + 20 free)

Who Should Use This?

✅Seniors with joint stiffness or arthritis

✅Office workers with poor posture or sedentary lifestyle

✅Athletes or active individuals needing recovery support

✅People with backache, sore knees, or muscle tension

⚠️Consult a doctor if under medication or treatment.

*Results may vary from person to person.

detail_html:
*This product comes with expiry dates. The expiry date for each item is stated under the listing’s product title or option name.

Caltrate is a trusted supplement brand dedicated to supporting strong bones and overall wellness. Formulated with high-quality calcium and essential nutrients like Vitamin D3, Caltrate helps your body absorb calcium effectively for healthier bones, joints, and muscles. Backed by decades of nutritional science, it’s a simple daily way to stay active and confident at every age.

Product Types:

✓ Caltrate Joint Health with UC-II® Collagen Supplements

✓ Caltrate Bone and Muscle Health Supplements

✓ Caltrate Bone and Muscle 50+ Health Supplements

JOINT HEALTH WITH UC-II® COLLAGEN SUPPLEMENTS

Supports your overall joint health. Caltrate Joint Health is scientifically designed with high-quality ingredients, including UC-II® Collagen which helps enhance healthy joint function, to help keep you moving. Joint Health: UC-II® Collagen helps enhance joint health function and reduces mild joint pain associated with symptoms of mild arthritis. Mobility: Vitamin C for collagen formation to help promote joint mobility. Healthy Cartilage Recovery: Manganese is essential for healthy connective tissue development and UC-II® Collagen supports healthy cartilage recovery 

BONE AND MUSCLE HEALTH SUPPLEMENTS (Purple)

Contains calcium to help build & maintain strong bones, as well as vitamin D to uptimise calcium absorption and support muscle strength. Caltrate Bone & Muscle also contains 4 other minerals to support healthy bones.

• Supports healthy bones & muscles

• 600mg calcium

• 1000IU vitamin D3

• 50mg Magnesium

• 7.5mg Zinc

• 500mcg Copper

• 1.75mg Manganese

• Adults take one tablet daily with liquid after a meal

Active Ingredients:Calcium (as calcium carbonate) 600mg, Colecalciferol (Vitamin D3) 25 micrograms (1,000IU), Magnesium (as magnesium oxide) 50mg, Zinc (as zinc oxide) 7.5mg, Copper (as cupric sulfate) 500 micrograms, Manganese (as manganese sulfate monohydrate) 1.75mg *Non-binding information. Contains: Soya Bean Products.

BONE AND MUSCLE 50+ YEARS

Specially formulated to support the bone health of people over 50 years. Caltrate Bone & Muscle 50+ is specially formulated to support the bone health needs of people over 50 years with an increased daily dose of calcium, compared to Caltrate Bone & Muscle. Caltrate Bone & Muscle also contains 4 other minerals to support healthy bones. 

• 600mg Calcium

• 500IU Vitamin D3

• 50mg Magnesium

• 7.5mg Zinc

• 500mcg Copper

• 1.75mg Manganese

• Adults over 50 take one tablet twice daily with water after meal

Active Ingredients:

Calcium (as calcium carbonate) 600mg, Colecalciferol (Vitamin D3) 25 micrograms (1,000IU), Magnesium (as magnesium oxide) 50mg, Zinc (as zinc oxide) 7.5mg, Copper (as cupric sulfate) 500 micrograms, Manganese (as manganese sulfate monohydrate) 1.75mg *Non-binding information. 

Contains: Soya Bean Products.

Formulations include options for general bone and muscle health, joint mobility, and specialized support for adults over 50.
Convenient daily tablets taken with meals make it easy to maintain active, confident living at any age.

title: Himalaya Bone & Joint Wellness Shigru Supplements 60s | Reduce Joint Stiffness and Inflammation | Helps Relieve Pain
detail_text: Himalaya Wellness Shigru Bone & Joint Wellness Tablets 60s Reduces joint stiffness, shigru targets key enzymes that facilitate the release of pro-inflammatory chemicals in the joints to help suppress inflammation and pain. Directions for Use: 1 tablet twice daily or as directed by your physician. Composition: Each tablet contains: Shigru (Moringa pterygosperma) leaf extract - 250 mg Good to Know: - 100% vegetarian. - Free from sugar, artificial colors, artificial flavors, preservatives. Special Instructions: It is advisable to consult your physician before you start using the product in these situations: - Pregnancy - Breastfeeding - In Conditions which require special medical care
